rules.rule: every evidence decomposition MUST be reviewer-attributed and cite source_evidence_id, evidence_kind ∈ EVIDENCE_KINDS, and content_sha256.
decomposition is reviewer-proposed; the runtime MUST NOT autonomously decompose evidence.
video decompositions MUST cite an ordered list of keyframes with timestamps; gaps in timeline ordering BLOCK approval.
PDF decompositions MUST cite ordered page indices starting at 1; gaps BLOCK approval.
spreadsheet decompositions MUST cite each worksheet by deterministic name and column count.
image decompositions MUST cite at least one visual anchor or OCR-ready region.
decomposition manifests are append-only; in-place mutation is FORBIDDEN.
decomposition MUST NOT mutate the source evidence file or any prior-layer storage tree.
